description: Machine-readable skill policy for project-workflow managed repositories.

required.name: project-workflow
required.reason: Universal startup, branch safety, progress tracking, verification, and handoff routine.
required.install_command: npx -y skills add MustafaShaaban/agent-project-workflow --skill project-workflow --global --agent claude-code --agent codex --copy

required.name: clean-code-guard
required.reason: Required for standard and strict professional projects.
required.install_command: npx -y skills add amElnagdy/guard-skills --skill clean-code-guard --global --agent claude-code --agent codex --copy

required.name: test-guard
required.reason: Required for standard and strict professional projects.
required.install_command: npx -y skills add amElnagdy/guard-skills --skill test-guard --global --agent claude-code --agent codex --copy

required.name: docs-guard
required.reason: Required for standard and strict professional projects.
required.install_command: npx -y skills add amElnagdy/guard-skills --skill docs-guard --global --agent claude-code --agent codex --copy

conditional_required.name: wp-guard
conditional_required.reason: Required for WordPress core, plugin, theme, block, and site safety.
conditional_required.install_command: npx -y skills add amElnagdy/guard-skills --skill wp-guard --global --agent claude-code --agent codex --copy

conditional_required.name: woo-guard
conditional_required.reason: Required for WooCommerce checkout, orders, payments, shipping, and tax work.
conditional_required.install_command: npx -y skills add amElnagdy/guard-skills --skill woo-guard --global --agent claude-code --agent codex --copy

optional.name: wp-plugin-development
optional.reason: Recommended when building or changing WordPress plugins.

optional.name: wp-block-development
optional.reason: Recommended when building blocks or block editor integrations.

optional.name: wp-performance
optional.reason: Recommended for production WordPress performance work.

optional.name: wp-phpstan
optional.reason: Recommended when PHPStan is available in the WordPress project.

optional.name: wp-playground
optional.reason: Recommended for browser-based WordPress smoke tests when useful.

install_rules.approved_only: Install or print only skills with install_approved=true and a documented install_command.
install_rules.manual: Unknown, missing, or unapproved commands must be shown as manual steps.
install_rules.precedence: Optional executor, build, debug, Superpowers, or similar workflow skills cannot replace Spec Kit clarify/spec/plan/tasks unless the owner explicitly overrides the repository policy.
